{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154537DF481ADB85BF3E55D4D0"}"},"total":253},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442132863758828313","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"强烈推荐！！！很好看，很喜欢女主这种雷厉风行 外表看似冷淡 实则内心是很柔软的。鱼幼薇 我觉得好遗憾呀 说不出口的爱  每个角色都塑造的很好[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732762665,"group_id":"7385927452062649406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwOgW6dKWPVpqoT5dJ0RbnV8QBtYs3YP+3qz6g36xcxH","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3fc6eb3f9d6414ab39f50ec4ef8bb1a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789135&x-signature=EoNcugAdggsyAd8FHU%2B6mH7rzRY%3D","user_id":"4151366681626936","user_name":"小囡囡.."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4151366681626936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1738541501,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7385927452062649406","book_info":{"abstract":"（女强，基建，爽文，无系统，稳定更新）
无cp，喜欢大女主的有福啦
楚辞身为21世纪理科博士，一朝穿越到龙腾王朝。
刚来就遭受楚家大变，被右相陷害，一朝从京城贵女变成接替父辈官职的小小县令。
松阳县。
县丞安比槐：见过大人。
松阳县百姓：终于有人管我们了！
楚辞握着拳头，总有一日她会回京报仇。
在松阳县先挖水渠，造水车，制肥料。
接着因地制宜，在河里人工养殖河蚌珍珠。
珍珠批量出世，松阳县从无人问津在一起，一跃成为龙腾王朝炙手可热的地方。
房价一度可以和京城媲美。
你想把我埋没，却不知我是颗种子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o94f32f787239f6a6e47a09cf80a3a6ae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阿萨姆奶茶","author_id":"","book_id":"7385927452062649406","book_name":"女穿女，带领家国走繁荣","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#888080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1542人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7385927491212296766","read_count":"1542","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1007356"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"443","tags":"种田,古代言情,乡村,穿越,女强,今穿古,基建,发家致富","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2b5a33d0226d4822fc78e1795ec252fc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435937&x-signature=N8AEs8M1UR4Vy3oqI9w90KJJ43Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2040335424035032","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
